nasb.text: ‘They have blown the trumpet and made everything ready, but no one is going to the battle, for My wrath is against all their multitude.

esv.text: “They have blown the trumpet and made everything ready, but none goes to battle, for my wrath is upon all their multitude.

cnv.text: “‘他們吹了號角，準備了一切， 卻沒有人出去作戰； 因為我的烈怒要臨到眾人身上。

ccb.text: “他们吹响了号角，做好了一切准备，却无人出战，因为我的烈怒临到了所有的人。
